node.text: Loved seeing you last night at the event!! You always shine so bright Rachel… especially on the red carpet!!!
You are the most entertaining smartest on camera talent, and I know you’re off camera  heart, I’ve never met. You are fantastic. Keep it going Rachel!!! And by the way, you’re funny as hell
🔥❤️. Will you be at Swim Week this year?
